incorrect.evidence_quote: using mTESR1 medium (Stem Cell Technologies) with 100 U/mL penicillin and 100 μg/mL streptomycin (Corning), at 37˚C in 5% CO 2 .

recall_misses.source_says: Day-staged CDM I-IV protocol: CDM I day 0-18; CDM II from day 18; CDM III from day 35; CDM IV from day 70. Extracted timeline is empty [].
recall_misses.evidence_quote: From day 18, the floating aggregates were cultured ... in CDM II ... On day 35, cell aggregates were transferred to spinner-flask bioreactors ... in CDM III ... From day 70, organoids were cultured in CDM IV
recall_misses.source_loc: methods_text: Organoid differentiation; corroborated visually by Fig.1a schematic (Day 0/18/35/70 axis with CDM I-IV)

recall_misses.source_says: CDM I base = Glasgow-MEM; CDM II base = DMEM/F12. Only PSC-maintenance medium mTESR1 was captured as base_media.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Cortical Differentiation Medium (CDM) I, containing Glasgow-MEM (Gibco), 20% Knockout Serum Replacement ... CDM II, containing DMEM/F12 medium (Gibco), 2mM Glutamax

recall_misses.item: seeding / aggregation parameters (passaging reported as not_reported)
recall_misses.source_says: Day 0 single-cell dissociation with Accutase and reaggregation of 9,000 cells per well; passaging field set to not_reported.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: on day 0, feeder-free cultured human PSCs ... were dissociated to single cells with Accutase (Gibco), and 9,000 cells per well were reaggregated in ultra-low cell-adhesion 96-well plates

recall_misses.source_says: Orbital agitation at 70 rpm from day 18; spinner-flask at 56 rpm from day 35. Not captured in culture_conditions.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: under orbital agitation (70 rpm) in CDM II ... transferred to spinner-flask bioreactors (Corning) and maintained at 56 rpm, in CDM III

recall_misses.source_says: Matrigel used at 1% (CDM III) and 2% (CDM IV); extracted Matrigel supplement has concentration null.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: CDM III, consisting of CDM II supplemented with 10% fetal bovine serum (FBS) ... and 1% Matrigel (Corning). From day 70 ... CDM IV, consisting of CDM III supplemented with B27 supplement (Gibco) and 2% Matrigel.

recall_misses.source_says: Quantified supplements not captured: 20% KSR, 0.1mM MEM-NEAA, 1mM pyruvate, 0.1mM 2-mercaptoethanol, 2mM Glutamax, 1% N2, 1% Lipid Concentrate, 0.25 ug/mL fungizone, 10% FBS, 5 ug/mL heparin, 100 U/mL penicillin, 100 ug/mL streptomycin.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: 20% Knockout Serum Replacement (Gibco), 0.1 mM Minimum Essential Medium non-essential amino acids ... 1 mM pyruvate (Gibco), 0.1 mM 2-mercaptoethanol (Gibco), 100 U/mL penicillin, and 100 μg/mL streptomycin

recall_misses.source_says: Five PSC lines used across the study (PGP1, HUES66, 11a, GM08330, Mito 210); extraction reports only PGP1.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: the HUES66 hESC and the 11a hiPSC lines from the Harvard Stem Cell Institute; the GM08330 hiPSC line ... and the Mito 210 hiPSC line
recall_misses.source_loc: methods_text: PSC culture; Extended Data Table 1

recall_misses.source_says: Protocol explicitly removes the 40% O2 requirement (cultured at ambient O2); o2_pct left null.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: We eliminated the need for growth under 40% O 2 , the need for cell aggregates to be periodically bisected, and the use of high O 2 penetration dishes, by adapting the cultures to growth in spinner-flask bioreactors.

notes: All extracted identities/doses are verbatim-correct against the source (cell line PGP1, Geltrex matrix, mTESR1, 5% CO2, and the four signaling factors Y-27632 20uM, IWR1 3uM, SB431542 5uM, SAG 100nM all exact). Recall is the weakness: the entire day-staged timeline (empty []), differentiation base media (Glasgow-MEM, DMEM/F12), seeding/aggregation (9,000 cells, Accutase), agitation speeds (70/56 rpm), and nearly all supplement and Matrigel concentrations were missed despite being explicitly stated. Temperature 37C was present in a captured quote but not written to temperature_c. Fig.1a schematic (read visually) corroborates the CDM I-IV / day-0-18-35-70 timeline but adds no new quantitative protocol data beyond the methods text. Note: extraction also lists 5 cell lines collapsed to PGP1 only. Evidence confidence values in prediction are all 0.0.
